name: Lars von Trier

acts.description: At 2011 Cannes press conference declared 'I'm a Nazi' and expressed understanding for Hitler
Björk and other actresses documented his psychologically abusive directing methods

behavior_summary: Provocateur director who declared himself a Nazi at Cannes and whose psychological brutality toward actresses, especially Björk, is extensively documented.

art.summary: Co-founded Dogme 95. Made some of the most formally and emotionally challenging films in contemporary cinema. Genuine visionary however unbearable as a person.

accountability_events: 2011 banned from Cannes Film Festival after Hitler remarks

verdict.blurb: He said 'I'm a Nazi' at Cannes and Björk said never again after working with him and he's still making films that win major prizes. Melancholia is genuinely great. The press conference was not a bit. Cannes eventually let him back.
